zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas I of Workington於大約1150年出生時，他的父親Gospatric of Workington23歲，母親Egeliva17歲。他於大約1175年與Amabilis de Culwen結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1201年在英國波藍德享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas I of Workington于大约1150年出生时，他的父亲Gospatric of Workington23岁，母亲Egeliva17岁。他于大约1175年与Amabilis de Culwen结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1201年在英国波藍德享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Workington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Worcestershire): habitational name from Wormington in Gloucestershire or Berry Wormington in Stanton (also Gloucestershire). Perhaps also from Warmington in Northamptonshire. The placenames derive from an Old English personal name Wyrma + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas I of Workington was born about 1150, his father, Gospatric of Workington, was 23 and his mother, Egeliva, was 17. He married Amabilis de Culwen about 1175. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1201, in Cumberland, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas I of Workington est né environ 1150, son père, Gospatric of Workington, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Egeliva, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Amabilis de Culwen environ 1175. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1201, à Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas I of Workington um 1150 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gospatric of Workington 23 und seine Mutter Egeliva 17. Er hat um 1175 Amabilis de Culwen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1201 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Cumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas I of Workington è nato il circa 1150, il suo padre, Gospatric of Workington, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Egeliva, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Amabilis de Culwen circa 1175. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1201, nel Cumberland, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.Workington, Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランドウオルキントン
ja.Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランド
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas I of Workingtonが約1150年に生まれた時，父Gospatric of Workingtonは23歳，母Egelivaは17歳であった。約1175年にAmabilis de Culwenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1201年にイギリスクウンバーランドで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas I of Workington(이)가 대략 1150년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gospatric of Workington(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Egeliva(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1175년 Amabilis de Culwen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1201년 영국 c벌랜드에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1150–about 1201: tany ho any amin'ny 1150–tany ho any amin'ny 1201

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas I of Workington nasceu aproximadamente 1150, seu pai, Gospatric of Workington, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Egeliva, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Amabilis de Culwen aproximadamente 1175. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1201, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas I of Workington родился около 1150 г., его отцу по имени Gospatric of Workington было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Egeliva, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Amabilis de Culwen около 1175 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1201 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

sm.about 1150–about 1201: e tusa o le 1150–e tusa o le 1201

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas I of Workington nació aproximadamente 1150, su papá, Gospatric of Workington, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Egeliva, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Amabilis de Culwen aproximadamente 1175. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1201, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
